title: bus of wreal (packed array) not supported
body:
---


Author Name: **j briquet**
Original Redmine Issue: 1154 from https://www.veripool.org

Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Hi Wilson,

I faced an issue regarding usage of packed array for wreal net. Actually, I was trying to instantiate a module which contains a wreal input declared as a packed array (supported by commercial simulator) to an upper net declared the same way. But the tool returned two errors :
* mismatch between port which is an array and expression which is not an array
* expected non-complex non-double pin connection in width check

Is that error expected ? You'll find in attachment the file you've created for wreal bugs. 

Best regards,
J-P
